rationale: Both candidates independently catch the exact latent gap (the still-unfixed get_cache_scale call in hunyuan_image3_transformer.py), and both give concrete, actionable file/line feedback. Y is slightly stronger on grounding: it verifies the core design claim against actual upstream vLLM source (specific lines in utils.py/weight_utils.py/fp8.py) rather than just the local diff, and its test critique (delegated-loader test bypasses AutoWeightsLoader so never proves the real mapping) is sharper and closer to the ground truth's 'test doesn't fully close the loop' concern. X's diffusion-transformer finding is equally valid but pairs with a nit that cites a wrong file path (mimo_audio_llm/mimo_audio_llm.py vs the actual mimo_audio/mimo_audio_llm.py), slightly hurting its precision. Neither fully reproduces the ground truth's specific 'real quantized checkpoint smoke test' ask or the getattr-degradation nuance for qwen2_old, so recall is middling for both.
